hooks.command: cd {{PROJECT_PATH}} && if [ -f Package.swift ]; then BUILD_OUT=$(swift build 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo 'BUILD FAILED — fix before continuing:'; echo "$BUILD_OUT" | grep -E '(error:|warning:)' | head -10; exit 1; else echo 'Build OK'; fi; fi
hooks.description: Build after edits — show only errors if build fails
Block stop and re-inject next task until all features pass
